text: What to know about hantavirus, the illness linked to a cruise ship outbreak - AP News
fullText: A suspected outbreak aboard a cruise ship of a rare, a rodent-borne illness called hantavirus has left three people dead and sickened others. Health authorities have confirmed hantavirus infections in two of the cases and suspect it in the others. Hantaviruse…

text: Ozempic Is Killing Off Weight Loss Surgeries. That’s a Problem - Gizmodo
fullText: The number of bariatric surgeries performed annually in the U.S. has taken a sharp drop lately, new research shows, coinciding with the rise of GLP-1 therapy.

ICE is giving local police big money to help with immigration enforcement - NPR
fullText: The federal government is offering local law enforcement incentives to join a program that gives their officers authority to make immigration arrests. Police leaders say the funds, which include money for salaries, equipment and vehicles, are enticing.

text: Live Updates: Iran ceasefire holding for now, Hegseth says, after Iran attacks UAE, ships in Strait of Hormuz - CBS News
fullText: Hegseth said the ceasefire with Iran "certainly holds" for now after a naval clash between Iranian and U.S. forces and renewed attacks on the UAE.

fullText: FX dropped a surprise flashback episode of 'The Bear' written by and starring Jon Bernthal and Ebon Moss-Bachrach.

text: Rahm eligible for Ryder Cup after striking tour deal - BBC
fullText: Jon Rahm will be eligible for next year's Ryder Cup in Ireland after striking a deal to continue playing on the DP World Tour.

text: Officials in Tennessee continue search for veteran accused of shooting wife - NBC News
fullText: A manhunt is underway as Tennessee officials search for a retired special forces veteran accused of shooting his wife during a domestic altercation early Friday.

text: Science gets closer to understanding how a psychedelic trip changes the brain - NBC News
fullText: A single psychedelic trip may cause physical changes in the brain that could explain why some people report psychological benefits from the experience, a small study suggests.

text: ‘GTA 6’ Should Cost $80 So The Industry Can Raise Prices, Says Bank Of America - Forbes
fullText: GTA 6 has not yet committed to a price, but Bank of America is saying they should make it $80 so then the rest of the industry can also price that high.

fullText: The storm for Colorado and Wyoming comes as the region grapples with widespread extreme drought, following a winter with less than half the normal snowfall amounts.
